parameters.prompt:
Create a professional podcast script for Tax4Us based on the following episode plan:

Title: {{ $json.title }}
Topic: {{ $json.topic }}
Duration: {{ $json.duration }}
Target Audience: {{ $json.targetAudience }}
Keywords: {{ $json.keywords.join(", ") }}

Requirements:
1. Write in a conversational, professional tone
2. Include natural speaking patterns and transitions
3. Structure with clear segments as outlined
4. Include relevant examples and case studies
5. Add call-to-action for Tax4Us services
6. Optimize for audio delivery
7. Include timestamps for each segment

Format the script with:
- Clear speaker directions
- Natural conversation flow
- Engaging hooks and transitions
- Professional tax advice content
- Call-to-action elements

Start with an engaging introduction and structure the content for optimal listener engagement.

Create an SEO-optimized podcast episode description for the following episode:

Title: {{ $json.title }}
Script: {{ $("Script Generation").item.json.text }}
Keywords: {{ $json.keywords.join(", ") }}

Requirements:
- Keep it between 200-300 words
- Include primary keywords naturally
- Make it compelling and click-worthy
- Summarize the main value proposition
- Include a call to action for Tax4Us services
- Optimize for podcast platform discovery

Return only the episode description text, no additional formatting.

Create a detailed image prompt for an AI image generation tool to create podcast episode artwork for this episode:

Title: {{ $json.title }}
Topic: {{ $json.topic }}
Description: {{ $("Episode Description").item.json.text }}

Requirements:
- Create professional podcast episode artwork
- Include relevant visual elements (microphone, tax documents, business imagery)
- Use Tax4Us brand colors and style
- Make it engaging and relevant to the topic
- Specify the style (professional, modern, clean)
- Include aspect ratio 1:1 for podcast platforms
- Ensure it stands out in podcast directories

Return only the image prompt text, no additional formatting.
